notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ben Rice reaches on a fielding error by second baseman Ernie Clement.

notableEvents.label: Kazuma Okamoto GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. George Springer to 3rd. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Kazuma Okamoto rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. to first baseman Ben Rice. George Springer to 3rd. Nathan Lukes out at 2nd. Kazuma Okamoto out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohendrick Piñango GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Brandon Valenzuela out at 2nd. Yohendrick Piñango out at 1st.
